query.text:
if dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$CheckSQLInjection(@stt_rec) = 0 return &GLTranReportSql; else begin declare @ma_tt nvarchar(16), @so_tt nvarchar(255), @so_tt2 nvarchar(255), @ngay_tt nvarchar(255), @ngay_tt2 nvarchar(255), @ten_bc nvarchar(255), @ten_bc2 nvarchar(255) select @ma_tt = rtrim(ltrim(val)) from options where name='r_cdkt' select @so_tt=so_tt, @so_tt2 = so_tt2, @ngay_tt = ngay_tt, @ngay_tt2 = ngay_tt2 from report1 where ma_tt=@ma_tt select @ten_bc = ten_bc, @ten_bc2=ten_bc2 from report2 where ma_tt=@ma_tt and sysid='IRTran'
-- Lay tk_vt trong dmvt cach nhau bang dau ',' create table #dmtkvt(tk_vt nvarchar(64)) insert into #dmtkvt select distinct tk_vt from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join d74$$partition$current b with(nolock) on (a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec) where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec
declare @tk_vt nvarchar(64) = '' select @tk_vt = @tk_vt + ', ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(tk_vt)) from #dmtkvt select @tk_vt = LTRIM(RIGHT(@tk_vt, LEN(@tk_vt) - 1)) drop table #dmtkvt
-- Lấy tài khoản đối ứng(tk_co) create table #dmtkco(tk_co nvarchar(64)) insert into #dmtkco select distinct tk_du from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join d74$$partition$current b with(nolock) on (a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec) where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec
declare @tk_co nvarchar(64) = '' select @tk_co = @tk_co + ', ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(tk_co)) from #dmtkco select @tk_co = LTRIM(RIGHT(@tk_co, LEN(@tk_co) - 1)) drop table #dmtkco
-- Lay ten kho create table #dmkho (ma_kho nvarchar(126), ten_kho nvarchar(256) ) insert into #dmkho select distinct a.ma_kho, '' from d74$$partition$current a with(nolock) where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec Update #dmkho set ten_kho = rtrim(ltrim(a.ma_kho)) + ' - ' + b.ten_kho from #dmkho a left join dmkho b on a.ma_kho = b.ma_kho
declare @kho nvarchar(4000) = '' select @kho = @kho + ', ' + LTRIM(RTRIM(ten_kho)) from #dmkho select @kho = LTRIM(RIGHT(@kho, LEN(@kho) - 1)) drop table #dmkho
declare @m_ma_nt0 varchar(10), @key varchar(128) select @m_ma_nt0 = val from options where name = N'm_ma_nt0' select case when a.ong_ba <> '' then a.ong_ba else case when @@language = 'V' then d.ten_kh else d.ten_kh2 end end as ong_ba, b.ma_kho, isnull(c.dia_chi,'') dia_diem, ltrim(a.so_ct) so_ct, a.t_tien, a.t_tien_nt, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(@m_ma_nt0, a.t_tien, @@language) t_tien_in_word, dbo.MaxvOnline$Function$System$ReadCurrency(a.ma_nt, a.t_tien_nt, @@language) t_tien_nt_in_word, replace(str(day(a.ngay_ct),2),' ','0') ngay, replace(str(month(a.ngay_ct),2),' ','0') thang, cast(year(a.ngay_ct) as char(4)) nam, RTRIM(a.ma_kh) as ma_kh, d.ten_kh, d.dia_chi, a.dien_giai, @tk_vt as tk_no, @tk_co as tk_co, @so_tt as so_tt, @so_tt2 as so_tt2, @ngay_tt as ngay_tt, @ngay_tt2 as ngay_tt2, @ten_bc as ten_bc, @ten_bc2 as ten_bc2, @kho as ten_kho from @@prime$partition$current a with(nolock) left join d74$$partition$current b with(nolock) on (a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec and b.stt_rec0 = (select min(stt_rec0) from d74$$partition$current with(nolock) where stt_rec = a.stt_rec)) left join dmkho c with(nolock) on b.ma_kho = c.ma_kho left join dmkh d with(nolock) on a.ma_kh = d.ma_kh where a.stt_rec = @stt_rec
select @key = 'a.stt_rec = ''' + @stt_rec + '''' exec pr_PrintIRTran @@language, @key, 'd74$$partition$current', @@id end

header.v: Họ và tên người giao hàng:
Số chứng từ gốc kèm theo:
